title: Greptile .greptile/files.json
$comment: Upstream census: https://www.greptile.com/docs/code-review/greptile-config-reference (files.json section) — Greptile publishes no official schema; this file mirrors that reference and is corrected against it on drift.

path.description: Path relative to the directory containing the .greptile/ folder

description.description: What the file contains and why it is relevant to reviews

scope.description: Globs relative to the .greptile/ directory; include this file only when reviewing matching files
